library_preparation_preflight.summary: The artifact is a pure Scala 3 compile-time macro module with no service/Docker dependency and no required extra Maven dependency, but meaningful ValueEnumMacros coverage requires the Scala compiler option `-Yretain-trees`.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: Use Scala 3 tests that exercise `enumeratum.EnumMacros` and `enumeratum.ValueEnumMacros` through small inline wrapper methods or the normal Enumeratum-style pattern. For any `ValueEnumMacros.find*ValueEntriesImpl` coverage, configure test Scala compilation with `-Yretain-trees`; the macro source explicitly aborts without it and the README documents this Scala 3 limitation. Keep values literal so the macro can inspect them at compile time.
risks: Testing only runtime references to the macro classes will not provide meaningful coverage because the library's behavior happens at Scala compile time.
Adding `com.beachape:enumeratum_3` is not required for setup; it can make tests more idiomatic, but direct macro wrappers can exercise the requested artifact without an extra dependency.
